##DESCRIPTION=Blue cut gemstone. Some suggest that the locality is incorrect, and is possibly Vaca Morta quarry,  Bahia, Brazil, but we have no way of proving this at the moment
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
